text_0.text: [speed=0.19]Heeeeey, you ruined my home![speed=0.05] [delay=1.0]Can't an old man rest miserably in his house without being hassled by little shit disturbers like you?[delay=1.5] Are you gonna pay for a new home? [delay=1.0][speed=0.045]Do you even know how much a vengeful, bouncy, clay pot house costs?[delay=2.0] [speed=0.01]Hm?[delay=2.0][speed=0.03] I doubt very much that you do! [delay=1.0]So how exactly do you expec---[delay=2.0]oh wait, I can just obliterate you, that's way more fun than what I was doing before! [delay=1.0]TO WAR, BABAY!!
text_0.name: Angry Wizard
